north_star_thesis: Interpretable accident anticipation should be built on an intervenable semantic state space, not post-hoc explanation over a black-box predictor.
audit_timestamp_note: Compiled from stable artifacts currently present in the repository and paper-facing analysis outputs.

dad_current_submission_line.note: Use as canonical DAD submission line; do not mix with ontology-search or local-search runs.

dad_local_search_best_new.note: Useful for support analysis, not canonical submission line.

a3d_local_search_best_new.note: Useful for support analysis, not canonical submission line.

core_claims.claim: Accident anticipation should be formulated as concept-conditioned sequential decision making rather than binary classification with post-hoc explanation.
evidence: Method design with concept-augmented policy state in sec_method.tex
DAD/A3D empirical results showing interpretable competitive operating points
Current timing-faithfulness outputs show prediction timing but not yet a fully functioning actor-policy crossing story
gaps: Need stronger policy-level timing evidence beyond prediction branch
Need cleaner contrast against threshold-only timing

core_claims.claim: Ontology construction is part of the method, not a hidden preprocessing assumption.
evidence: paper ontology figures and coverage/evolution/case-study assets
gaps: Need full controlled DAD/A3D comparison block under the shared launcher to make this central in the final submission

core_claims.claim: Semantic concept edits can systematically alter alert timing in semantically aligned ways.
evidence: Appendix intervention figures and backbone-level rerun assets
output/insight_analysis/dad_intervention_v4_hybrid_boost1/concept_intervention_summary.json shows mean_alert_shift = -2.04 on 64 samples with heterogeneous case behavior
gaps: Current actor branch is effectively flat in archived timing/intervention analysis outputs
Need family-level intervention protocol and stronger multi-family casebank evidence

core_claims.claim: INSIGHT is the first fully verified WHY+WHEN interpretable anticipation model with strong policy-level semantic control.
evidence: Current paper supports intrinsic WHY layer and concept-conditioned architecture
Current repository does not yet contain a complete policy-level intervention rerun with reliable actor dynamics
gaps: Need full policy-head checkpoints and actor-branch analyses
Need stronger comparative evidence against thresholding baselines

claims_to_remove_or_downgrade.claim_text: absolute SOTA on A3D / surpassing all non-interpretable methods
claims_to_remove_or_downgrade.reason: Current stable paper-facing A3D line is strong but not a verified global SOTA in the repository truth set.
Speculative and unsupported by current stable evidence.

claims_to_remove_or_downgrade.claim_text: full dual-layer policy intervention is already demonstrated
claims_to_remove_or_downgrade.reason: Current support is backbone-level / stored-trajectory intervention, not a complete actor-policy causal test.
Current paper package is empirical and does not include a finished theorem/proof stack.

reviewer_sensitive_points.actor_branch_issue: Current archived timing-faithfulness/intervention outputs show actor probabilities near 0.498 with null actor crossings. The paper must not overclaim actor-level timing evidence until refreshed artifacts exist.
reviewer_sensitive_points.protocol_separation: Keep canonical submission line, ontology comparison runs, and search runs separated.
reviewer_sensitive_points.seed_scope: Multi-seed DAD evidence exists for one curriculum line only and should be presented as stability diagnostics, not universal robustness.
reviewer_sensitive_points.intervention_scope: Use intervention evidence as partial support for intervenability, not as definitive causal proof.
reviewer_sensitive_points.hard_case_symmetry_scope: Current synchronized DAD diagnostics now include reviewer-confirmed mixed pairs and a passing process gate, but still do not establish global hard-case symmetry across scenario families; keep claims bounded to audited coverage.
